_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
The following timeline covers the Fit for 55 component regulations most directly affecting the workspace's operations. Each entry states the status and the workspace's required position by that date.

| Date | Event | Status | Workspace Position Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| 14 July 2021 | Commission publishes COM(2021) 550 final — Fit for 55 package | **In force (Communication)** | Awareness of package architecture |
| 10 May 2023 | CBAM Regulation (EU) 2023/956 enters force | **In force** | Legal confirmation on declarant role for EU imports of covered goods |
| October 2023 | CBAM transitional phase begins (quarterly reporting) | **In force** | If workspace holds declarant role on any covered goods import: reporting active |
| 13 September 2023 | AFIR Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 published | **In force** | No direct action required; monitor for road carrier network impacts |
| 22 September 2023 | FuelEU Maritime Regulation (EU) 2023/1805 published | **In force** | Review ocean carrier contracts for ETS/fuel cost pass-through clauses |
| 18 October 2023 | ReFuelEU Aviation Regulation (EU) 2023/2405 published | **In force** | Review air carrier contracts for SAF surcharge structure |
| 1 January 2024 | EU ETS maritime phase-in begins (40% of verified emissions) | **In force** | Track ocean rate changes on EU trade lanes; update cost models |
| 1 January 2025 | ReFuelEU Aviation 2% SAF blending mandate active at EU airports | **In force** | SAF surcharge tracking protocol operational; carrier surcharge data collected |
| 1 January 2025 | FuelEU Maritime GHG intensity limits begin | **In force** | Ocean carrier compliance data and surcharge structure confirmed |
| 1 January 2025 | EU ETS maritime phase-in rises (70% of verified emissions) | **In force** | Updated ocean cost models reflecting increased ETS burden |
| 2025 (financial year 2024 data) | CSRD first wave large undertakings begin reporting | **In force** | Per-shipment emissions data capability operational for affected clients |
| 2025 (expected) | Harmonised EU transport emissions calculation regulation — political agreement reached November 2025 | **Pre-adoption** | Monitor adoption timeline; align internal methodology to forthcoming standard |
| 1 January 2026 | EU ETS maritime 100% of verified emissions | **Future** | Ocean cost models updated; carrier contracts reviewed for full pass-through |
| 2030 | ReFuelEU Aviation SAF mandate rises to 6% | **Future** | Directional cost planning for air-primary operations |
| 2030 | HDV CO₂ standards: 45% reduction target for new HDVs | **Future** | Monitor road carrier fleet transition; ZEV infrastructure deployment tracked |
| 2030 | EU 55% net GHG reduction target vs 1990 levels | **Future** | All component regulations converge toward this target |

*Source: COM(2021) 550 final, European Commission, 14 July 2021. https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:52021DC0550*
*Source: Council of the European Union — Fit for 55. https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/policies/fit-for-55/*
*Source: Regulation (EU) 2023/2405 (ReFuelEU Aviation). https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/2405/oj/eng*
*Source: Regulation (EU) 2023/1805 (FuelEU Maritime). https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/1805/oj/eng*
*Source: Regulation (EU) 2023/956 (CBAM). https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32023R0956*
*Source: Regulation (EU) 2024/1610 (HDV CO₂ standards). https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=OJ:L_202401610*
*Source: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 (AFIR). https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/1804/oj/eng*

---
